title: Tutorial
text: Health Technology Assessment (HTA), reproducibility critical. ParCC acts digital logbook ensure every parameter can audited. Label : calculating, type specific name ‘Label’ box (e.g., “PFS Control Arm”  “Cost Surgery”). Calculate & Log: Click blue action button. calculates result  saves temporary session log. Review: Go  Report tab see table logged parameters. Export: Download HTML Report. document serves  Technical Appendix manuscript HTA dossier.

what: Tutorial 1: The Safety Data Problem (Rates to Probabilities)
title: Tutorial
text: Context: modeling new anticoagulant. key safety endpoint “Major Bleeding.” Challenge: clinical trial reports incidence rate : “2.5 major bleeds per 100 patient-years.” Mistake: Simply dividing 2.5 100 gives 0.025. ignores fact patients bleed removed “-risk” pool year. ParCC Solution: Navigate  Converters > Rate ↔︎ Probability. Input Rate = 2.5. Select Multiplier = 'Per 100'. Input Time = 1 (1-year model cycle). Result: 0.02469. precise annual probability Markov trace.

title: Tutorial
text: Context: using  UKPDS Risk Engine diabetes model. predicts  10-year risk coronary heart disease (e.g., 20%). Challenge: Markov model runs  1-year cycles. Dividing 20% 10 (2% per year) wrong risk compounds time. ParCC Solution: Navigate  Converters > Time Rescaling. Input Original Probability = 0.20. Input Original Time = 10 Years. Input New Time = 1 Year. Result: 0.0223 (approx 2.23%). Notice actual annual risk higher simple average implies.

title: Tutorial
text: Context: need project outcomes 20 years oncology drug, trial ran 3 years. IPD, published Kaplan-Meier curve. ParCC Solution: Look published curve. Pick two points summarize shape. Point 1: Month 12, survival 80%. Point 2: Month 36, survival 50%. Navigate  Survival > Weibull (2 Time Points). Input values (12, 0.8  36, 0.5). Result: ParCC calculates  Shape  Scale parameters extrapolate curve. Validation: Check plot ensure blue line passes points.

title: Tutorial
text: Context: modeling Heart Failure patients aged 65. general population mortality rate age 65  0.013. Using overestimate life expectancy. ParCC Solution: Navigate  Bg Mortality > SMR Adjustment. Input Base Rate = 0.013. Input SMR (Hazard Ratio) literature (e.g., 2.5). Result: 0.032. Use adjusted probability “Natural Death” node.

title: Tutorial
text: Context: running Probabilistic Sensitivity Analysis (PSA). costing study reports mean cost surgery  ₹25,000 (SE ₹5,000). Challenge: Using Normal distribution incorrect costs skewed negative. ParCC Solution: Navigate  PSA > Gamma Distribution (standard costs). Input Mean = 25000, SE = 5000. Result: ParCC calculates Shape (k)  Scale (theta) parameters. Tip: SE missing range (e.g., ₹15k - ₹35k), use ‘Mean & Range’ option estimate SE via Rule 4.

title: Tutorial
text: Context: new technology provides 0.5 additional QALYs requires expensive implantation surgery (₹50,000). government WTP threshold  ₹100,000 per QALY. maximum price can charge device? ParCC Solution: Navigate  Value-Based Pricing. Input Clinical Benefit (0.5) WTP (100000). Input Associated Costs (50000). Result: tool performs ‘Headroom Analysis’. Total Value: ₹50,000 (0.5 * 100k). Headroom: ₹50,000 (Value) - ₹50,000 (Surgery Cost) = 0. Outcome: Even though benefit valuable, surgery eats entire budget. device price must  ₹0 cost-effective threshold.

title: Tutorial
text: Sonnenberg FA, Beck JR. Markov models medical decision making: practical guide. Med Decis Making. 1993;13(4):322-338. Briggs , Claxton K, Sculpher M. Decision Modelling Health Economic Evaluation. Oxford University Press; 2006. Collett D. Modelling Survival Data Medical Research. 3rd ed. Chapman Hall/CRC; 2015. Cosh E, et al. value ‘innovation headroom’. Value Health. 2007;10(4):312-315.

what: Parameter Converter and Calculator for HTA
title: Parameter Converter and Calculator for HTA
text: ParCC decision support system Health Technology Assessment (HTA). bridges gap clinical evidence economic models automating complex parameter estimations.

title: Parameter Converter and Calculator for HTA
text: can install development version ParCC GitHub :

title: Parameter Converter and Calculator for HTA
Parameter Converter and Calculator for HTA
text: Core Conversions: Rate/Odds Probability, Time Rescaling. Survival Analysis: Weibull/Exponential fitting summary data. Value-Based Pricing: Headroom analysis Breakeven calculation. Reproducibility: Generates “Lab Notebook” HTML report every session.

title: Run the ParCC Application — run_app
text: Launches ParCC Shiny application default web browser.
